goal: Three ML services degraded simultaneously 2 hours after deployment v7.8.2. Model accuracy -22%, revenue impact 50K/hr. Find ALL root causes.
alert_summary: Multi-system failure: embedding_service_v3 errors +450%, feature_store cache miss 100%, ab_test_router sending 100% traffic to untested model_B. Deploy v7.8.2 2h ago.

embedding_service_v3.description: Embedding service. ONNX Runtime version mismatch after v7.8.2 deploy.

logs.msg: ONNX Runtime version mismatch: expected 1.15, found 1.18. Embedding vectors corrupted.
cosine similarity avg dropped from 0.82 to 0.11 - all embeddings corrupted

feature_store.description: Central feature store. Cache TTL set to 0s by v7.8.2 - serving stale features to ALL models.

logs.msg: Cache TTL=0s: all entries expiring instantly. Stale features being served.
Feature freshness violation: features aged 202 minutes served to model_serving

ab_test_router.description: AB test router. Config corrupted by v7.8.2 - routing 100% traffic to untested model_B.

logs.msg: Traffic split: model_A=0%, model_B=100%. Source: deployment_v7.8.2_routing.yaml
model_B timeout rate 23% under full traffic. Routing config corrupted.

model_server.description: Model serving. Degraded due to upstream failures.

logs.msg: Accuracy below threshold. Multiple upstream issues.

data_pipeline_b.description: Batch pipeline. Running normally. NOT related. Red herring.

api_gateway.description: API gateway. Operating normally. NOT involved. Red herring.

config_diff.author: ci-cd-bot
config_diff.pr_title: chore: bump onnx-runtime, reset cache TTL, update ab routing
config_diff.note: Three config changes in one PR v7.8.2 caused cascading failures.

feature_drift_data.summary: All features critically stale due to cache_ttl=0 in feature_store.
